summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bus Management System with new revenue/KM drill-down features and UI theme overhaul. All backend APIs (100% success rate) and frontend functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Admin login with new red theme
Dashboard loads with clickable Revenue and KM KPIs
Revenue Details page filters (daily/monthly/quarterly, depot, bus)
Revenue Details page charts and data tables
KM Details page filters (daily/monthly/quarterly, depot, bus)
KM Details page charts and data tables
New sidebar navigation items (Revenue, KM Tracking)
UI theme: Red primary buttons (#C8102E), dark gray sidebar (#1F2937), Inter font
All existing pages functional (Buses, Drivers, Billing, Tenders)
Backend APIs: GET /api/revenue/details with period/depot filters
Backend APIs: GET /api/km/details with period/depot filters
All 57 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
